build.description: Build the production desktop controller bundle (alias for `desktop:build`)

check.description: Workspace gate: format, lint, type-check, and license-check everything (frontend + Rust workspace)

check:licenses.description: Verify every Rust + JS dependency license is compatible with the project's AGPL-3.0 license

clean.description: Remove build artifacts (Rust target, node_modules, dist)

lint.description: Auto-format & fix the whole workspace (Biome for JS/CSS/JSON, rustfmt for Rust)

commands: git commit libretether-desktop/package.json Cargo.toml libretether-desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json Cargo.lock -m {{ shell_quote(concat('chore: release ', VAR.tag)) }}
release.description: Bump the version (major/minor/patch) across manifests, refresh Cargo.lock, commit, tag v<new>, then push so the release workflow runs

cases.linux: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev build-essential curl wget file libxdo-dev libssl-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev libxcb1-dev libxrandr-dev libxfixes-dev libdbus-1-dev libpipewire-0.3-dev libxkbcommon-dev clang freerdp3-x11

commands.default: echo 'No system setup step for {{ RUN.os }} — install the Tauri prerequisites manually: https://tauri.app/start/prerequisites/'

setup.description: Install system prerequisites (Tauri/WebKit deps) and JS dependencies (husky hooks are set up by the package.json prepare script)

test.description: Run the whole Rust workspace's tests

update-deps.description: Update JS dependencies to their latest versions and update Cargo crates
